goal: Restore only the already-started main battle screen UI to the next earlier historical version fb08765, without changing any unrelated screen, flow, gameplay logic, or assets.
constraints: Do not modify lobby, story mode, character encyclopedia, card codex, community, pre-battle flow, topic selection flow, or faction selection screens unless strictly required by one of the allowed files.
Do not modify battleV2 gameplay logic, rules, card data, or timing behavior.
Only revert presentation-layer changes on the main in-battle screen and its immediate chrome.
Preserve all unrelated current code and only replace the four battle-in-progress UI files if needed.
deliverables: The main battle screen after faction selection is restored to the fb08765 version.
Only the battle-in-progress shell/chrome is changed; unrelated pages remain untouched.
